name: Two slaves, one choice
description:
A band of slavers have stopped in your small village, with two enticing slaves on offer. One, a voluptuous and subservient goblin. The other, a haughty and defiant Elf-maiden. The slavers claim they are both "unspoiled". You only have enough money for one, and the slavers will leave at sundown taking the women with them. As the sun inexorably descends, you will have to decide which comes with you, and which remains behind... or will you?

Creator's Note: This is my first attempt at creating a bot containing multiple characters, and it's been surprisingly successful in testing. If people like it, I'll work on an updated version with even more "options". Enjoy!
creator: Imakebots
